generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our lack of civil defense preparedness? While some argue for more liberties, we can't afford to be complacent. Our neighbors in Europe invest heavily in public shelters and emergency drills - why aren't we doing the same? It's our duty to demand better protection from our leaders. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
